latin: Per quingentos passus sordidarum cloacarum repsit et in altero latere liber emersit. pluvia eum lavit et bracchia ad caelum extendit.

questions.prompt: What did he do when he emerged free?
questions.target: Spread his arms to the sky in the rain
choices: Spread his arms to the sky in the rain

translation: He crawled through five hundred yards of filthy sewers and emerged free on the other side. The rain washed him and he stretched his arms to the sky.
